agentScripts.response: APPROVED: Both pages are properly implemented with visual scaffold patterns (colored backgrounds, dashed borders, bold labels). The data.json file is present on the PR branch.

The screenshot shows two properly styled scaffold sections: a green Home page section and a blue About page section. Both have visible titles, dashed borders, and colored backgrounds — no blank content.
